title: Breakdown: Graph templates: configurable parameterized subgraphs applied to the work DAG
description:
Breakdown node bracketing epic **Graph templates: configurable parameterized subgraphs applied to the work DAG** (`9ac9fdac`).

Holds the decomposition of the approved plan into well-ordered child issues that cover the container's `[hard]` success criteria (REQ-01–REQ-08).
